reference: Yes, my husband has been suffering for months with spasms in his right hip area that have been diagnosed through soft tissue work as sacroiliac joint or psoas muscle tightness. He wakes in the night and cannot get comfortable to sleep. I am so worried; he travels for business and left today for New York. I am so worried and want to know what to do going forward when he returns from his trip. In the meantime, he is also suffering with sinus problems and a clogged ear that has been treated for the last two weeks with prednisone. Please help me, as again, I am so worried. He is amazing and continues to work and receive physical therapy, but what else could he do?
text: Yes, my husband has been suffering for months with spasms in his right hip area that have been diagnosed through soft work as sacral, iliac, or psoas muscle tightness. He wakes in the night and cannot get comfortable to sleep. I am so worried. He travels for business and left today for New York. I am so worried and want to know what to do going forward when he returns from his trip. In the meantime, he is also suffering with sinus problems and a clogged ear that has been treated for the last two weeks with prednisone. Please help me, as again I am so worried. He is amazing and continues to work and receive physical therapy, but what else could he do?
